description: Promotion manifest with coarse-grained subsystem version lifecycle and lane-aware stage/manager/RAG mapping.

stage6-v2.description: Stage-6 orchestrated multi-target batches with per-target literal contracts and scored secondaries

stage7-v1.description: Stage-7 multi-plan orchestration with partitioned subplans, audited partial completion, and manager-controlled split recovery

stage8-v1.description: Stage-8 resumable multi-plan orchestration with persisted checkpoints, explicit subplan rollback contracts, and audited resume/reconcile semantics

manager5-v1.description: Manager-5 orchestrator for Stage-6 multi-target batches

manager5-v2.description: Manager-5 scored grouped decomposition and per-target literal/message contracts

manager5-v3.description: Manager-5 adaptive grouped retry loop: retry failed secondaries with per-target refinement and continue on bounded secondary failures

manager5-v4.description: Manager-5 grouped rescue orchestration: after bounded secondary refinement failure, swap to high-link dropped alternates and record explicit rescue outcomes

manager6-v1.description: Manager-6 Stage-7 multi-plan orchestrator: executes bounded grouped subplans and performs split-on-failure reconciliation with auditable recovery decisions

manager8-v1.description: Manager-8 history-weighted orchestration state machine: strategy scoring, explicit retry/split/defer transitions, class-budgeted worker gating, and reconciled subplan execution for Stage-8 runs

rag4-v2.description: RAG-4 intent/domain-aware ranking with lane-clean emission and bounded companion expansion

rag4-v3.description: RAG-4 lane-link-diverse ranking with stronger companion link-strength gating and family diversity caps

rag6-v1.description: RAG-6 clustered multi-plan retrieval that packages lane-aligned targets into bounded linked-family subplans for Stage-7 orchestration

rag8-v1.description: RAG-8 conflict-risk and execution-yield clustered subplan planning with lane-clean rationale metadata for Stage-8 orchestration

stage6.label: Stage-6 preview lane
stage6.notes: Stage-6 candidate-ready lane with scored secondary decomposition, per-target literal contracts, adaptive grouped retry/decomposition, secondary rescue swap from linked dropped targets, and rag4 lane-link-diverse ranking

stage7.label: Stage-7 preview lane
stage7.notes: Stage-8 resumable preview lane with Manager-8 strategy-scored subplan orchestration, class-budgeted worker gating, and RAG-8 conflict/yield-aware clustered planning

production.assignment: literal span < stage4 threshold when --lane auto or explicit production
production.commit_controls: use stage3_manager to keep edits ≤2 lines and prefer comment-only changes

candidate.assignment: stage5 requests or explicit --lane candidate with dual-file batches
candidate.auto_reroute: disallowed targets fall back to manual lane

manual.assignment: used when a target violates lane constraints or a human needs manual guidance
manual.behavior: run Codex/manual workflow, update manifest to adjust lanes, then rerun Manager-4

stage6.behavior: plan with RAG-4, then execute sequential Stage-5 operations via Manager-5

stage7.behavior: plan with RAG-6 clustered subplans, execute each subplan through Stage-6, and reconcile partial completion via manager-controlled split recovery

stage_system.level10_definition: Autonomous multi-lane stage planner that selects and safely executes bounded work classes with policy-backed rollback and promotion gates.
key_blockers: Stage-8 resume/checkpoint semantics are preview-only and not yet promoted with deterministic gate assertions
Subplan rollback contract is explicit but remains delegated to Stage-6/5 bounded protections
evidence_to_advance: Repeated Stage-8 resume runs recover from paused/interrupted plans without replaying completed subplans
Stage-8 rollback contract fields are emitted in checkpoints/traces for all executed subplans

manager_system.level10_definition: Hierarchical manager orchestration with persisted plan lifecycle, bounded retries, and lane-aware policy enforcement across all stages.
key_blockers: Manager-6 currently reconciles failures via split-on-failure but does not yet optimize subplan order from historical outcomes
Cross-lane promotion/qualification feedback is not yet consumed directly in manager orchestration decisions
evidence_to_advance: Manager-6 traces show deterministic retry-vs-split-vs-drop decisions with persisted outcomes
Subplan reconciliation improves completion without expanding safety risk

rag_system.level10_definition: Cross-file, provenance-rich retrieval with confidence calibration and companion ranking that drives safe multi-target orchestration.
key_blockers: RAG-6 clustering is currently family/link based and does not yet include semantic conflict detection
Cluster ordering is not yet tuned by execution risk learned from Stage-7 outcomes
evidence_to_advance: RAG-6 emits bounded subplans with explicit provenance and cluster strategy metadata
Stage-7 runs show cleaner multi-plan packaging before manager-side repair

promotion_engine.level10_definition: Unified promotion control plane that tracks subsystem levels, lane states, and objective evidence required for each promotion decision.
key_blockers: Qualification is lane-centric and not yet subsystem-centric
No single report ties production/candidate/preview and next-target levels together
evidence_to_advance: Manifest encodes subsystem level policy and required evidence
Qualification report scores all major subsystems against policy

worker_utilization.level10_definition: Worker-first routing that maximizes safe local execution coverage with explicit task-class budgets and escalation telemetry.
key_blockers: Stage-6 success/failure worker evidence not aggregated in one report
Task-class promotion metrics are not connected to lane qualification
evidence_to_advance: Stage-5/6 traces include worker outcomes and rollback metadata
Qualification report surfaces worker success/failure trends

regression_framework.level10_definition: Regression and qualification framework that continuously validates lane guardrails and promotion eligibility with minimal deterministic checks.
key_blockers: Regression pack requirements are not evaluated subsystem-by-subsystem
Preview-lane confidence checks are mostly manual
evidence_to_advance: Qualification report verifies required regression packs per active lane
Manager and stage traces are correlated with policy thresholds

decisions.reason: candidate success/failure 4/5 does not satisfy promotion or demotion thresholds
core subsystem evidence is ready and stage6 success/failure 5/1 meets 3/1
candidate recovery rule met: streak 10>=6, success/failure 12/4, failure_cap=4
core subsystem evidence is ready and stage6 success/failure 5/1 meets 3/1
candidate recovery rule met: streak 10>=6, success/failure 12/4, failure_cap=4
core subsystem evidence is ready and stage6 success/failure 5/1 meets 3/1

stage_system.upgrade_goal: harden Stage-8 resume/checkpoint contracts into production-grade operational gates with deterministic interruption recovery guarantees
stage_system.minimum_validation: stage7 manager resume run demonstrates checkpoint-backed skip_completed_subplans with rollback contracts persisted per subplan

manager_system.upgrade_goal: Manager-9 adds long-horizon adaptive orchestration using persisted cross-plan strategy outcomes and conflict-aware rescue policies
minimum_validation: One non-dry Stage-8 run with strategy_state evidence and mixed transition outcomes
Trace evidence that budget-aware defer/split decisions are persisted and reconciled

rag_system.upgrade_goal: RAG-9 adds cross-run learning for clustering quality and dynamic conflict/yield calibration from execution outcomes
minimum_validation: RAG plans include calibrated risk/yield with reduced manager-side noisy drops across repeated runs
At least one Stage-8 run shows stable ordering benefits from calibrated clustering

promotion_engine.upgrade_goal: Promotion v3 adds enforced per-subsystem apply-time gate profiles across all promotable lanes with rollback-aware promotion contracts
minimum_validation: Dry-run and apply paths emit/enforce subsystem gate matrix
Promotion history records blocked gates and enforcement outcomes deterministically

worker_utilization.upgrade_goal: Worker v3 adds adaptive class-budget tuning from historical outcomes and plan-family escalation memory
minimum_validation: Stage-8 run shows class budgets are enforced and persisted
Follow-up run demonstrates adaptive budget/escalation influence from prior outcomes

regression_qualification_framework.upgrade_goal: Qualify v3 adds deterministic Stage-8 regression assertions tied to subsystem gate contracts and reproducible gate history diffs
minimum_validation: Qualification emits machine-readable v8 gate assertions with history rows
Regression path fails deterministically when required Stage-8 evidence is missing

stage_system.target_goal: Stage-7 transitions from single pass subplan orchestration to resumable multi-phase execution with explicit subplan rollback and resume checkpoints.
gap_from_current: Subplan execution is auditable but not resumable from persisted checkpoints.
Rollback semantics are bounded at subplan level but not codified as a stage-level contract artifact.
required_code_changes: Add persisted stage7 execution checkpoints under artifacts/manager6/plans/<plan_id>/checkpoints.json.
Add stage7 resume mode that skips already-succeeded subplans and replays only pending/failed checkpoints.
Emit explicit rollback_contract payload per subplan with rollback scope and post-rollback verification.
required_validation: One non-dry stage7 run interrupted mid-plan and resumed successfully from checkpoints.
Trace evidence proves rollback_contract is emitted and enforced for a failed subplan.
stage_system.operator_visible_behavior_change: Operators can resume an interrupted Stage-7 plan safely without rerunning completed subplans.

manager_system.target_goal: Manager orchestration adds policy-driven retry/split/drop state machine with historical outcome weighting across subplans.
gap_from_current: Manager-6 has split-on-failure recovery but no weighted strategy selection from historical outcomes.
Retry orchestration is deterministic but not policy-scored by plan-family history.
required_code_changes: Add manager6 strategy scorer using recent plan history (retry, split, drop, rescue) success rates by target family.
Add explicit decision_state transitions persisted in plan history: evaluate->choose_strategy->execute->reconcile.
Add bounded rescue budget per subplan family to prevent repeated low-yield retries.
required_validation: One stage7 grouped run where manager chooses different strategies for two subplans from history-weighted scoring.
Trace decision tags show chosen strategy and why alternatives were rejected.
manager_system.operator_visible_behavior_change: Manager decisions become explainable by strategy scores instead of fixed fallback order.

rag_system.target_goal: RAG emits conflict-aware, execution-risk-scored clusters tailored for Stage-7 subplan orchestration.
gap_from_current: RAG-6 clusters by linkage/family but does not estimate edit conflict risk between cluster members.
Cluster ordering is not optimized for expected execution yield.
required_code_changes: Add conflict-risk features (shared anchor overlap, same-line family proximity, shell-risk shape collisions).
Add cluster yield score used to order subplans before manager execution.
Emit per-cluster rationale fields: risk_score, yield_score, conflict_signals.
required_validation: RAG-6 plan output contains risk/yield metadata for each subplan.
At least one stage7 run shows fewer manager-side dropped targets due to cleaner cluster ordering.
rag_system.operator_visible_behavior_change: Stage-7 plans arrive pre-ordered by expected safety/yield rather than raw rank only.

promotion_engine.target_goal: Promotion decisions include subsystem-evidence gates and stage7 operational readiness checks, not lane-only counters.
gap_from_current: Promotion engine is lane-centric and does not enforce stage7 operational gate contracts.
Subsystem evidence exists but is not evaluated as first-class promotion blockers.
required_code_changes: Extend level10_promote to evaluate subsystem gate contracts from version8_upgrade_list validation status.
Add promotion decision payload with subsystem_gate_pass/fail matrix.
Add apply-time guard preventing promotion when required subsystem gate evidence is missing.
required_validation: Dry-run emits subsystem gate matrix for each decision.
Apply path blocks promotion when any required v8 gate is not satisfied.
promotion_engine.operator_visible_behavior_change: Promotion output shows explicit subsystem blockers, not just success/failure counters.
remaining_blockers: Lane decisions are still lane-metric first; subsystem gating is enforcement-only and not yet full readiness weighting

worker_utilization.target_goal: Worker routing supports staged multi-target execution classes with explicit per-class safety budgets and adaptive escalation.
gap_from_current: Worker routing is class-aware but does not expose per-class budget exhaustion handling to stage7 manager.
Escalation signals are captured in traces but not used to adapt subsequent dispatches.
required_code_changes: Add worker class budget ledger consumed by manager6 before dispatch.
Add adaptive escalation hints (defer, split, manual) when class budget is exhausted.
Persist worker outcome summaries per plan family for reuse by manager strategy scoring.
required_validation: One stage7 run where budget exhaustion causes adaptive split/manual reroute without unsafe execution.
worker_utilization.operator_visible_behavior_change: Operators get explicit worker budget/exhaustion reasons for reroutes.
remaining_blockers: Adaptive budget tuning from historical outcomes is not yet implemented

regression_qualification_framework.target_goal: Qualification validates Stage-7/Manager-6/RAG-6 operational gates with deterministic pass/fail assertions for v8 readiness.
gap_from_current: Qualification summarizes lanes and subsystem posture but does not enforce per-subsystem v8 gates.
Stage-7 evidence is present in traces but not validated as mandatory promotion prerequisites.
required_code_changes: Extend level10_qualify with explicit v8 gate assertions per subsystem using version8_upgrade_list requirements.
Add machine-readable gate results persisted to artifacts/promotion/qualification_history.jsonl.
Add minimal stage7 operational regression assertions to bin/micro_lane_stage7.sh.
required_validation: Qualification JSON includes subsystem gate verdicts and missing-evidence lists.
Regression pack fails when required stage7 gate evidence is absent.
regression_qualification_framework.operator_visible_behavior_change: Qualification output clearly states why v8 promotion is blocked or ready per subsystem.
remaining_blockers: Dedicated deterministic Stage-8 regression assertions are not yet integrated into micro_lane_stage7.sh
